reasoning: The NIST 800-53 AU-9(3) control focuses on the cryptographic protection of audit information. In a Kubernetes environment, this maps to ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state and secrets, is encrypted. Additionally, Kubernetes audit logs should be encrypted to protect audit information. Finally, Kubernetes secrets should be encrypted at rest to ensure cryptographic protection of sensitive data.
title: Protection Of Audit Information - Protection of audit information | cryptographic protection nist sp 800-53, r ev
